generated_body:
Hi [Leadership Name],

A critical bug in ExportService causes data corruption in user export files when the export exceeds 10,000 rows. Since 13 April, four enterprise customers have reported corrupted exports, impacting downstream analytics and compliance workflows.

Root cause analysis identified an off‑by‑one error in the pagination logic that truncates the final row and writes invalid data. A patch correcting the logic has been prepared and is awaiting senior engineer review for sign‑off before deployment.

Please review the attached patch and provide your approval by end of day today so we can push the fix to production and prevent further corruption. I will monitor the review status and notify you once the patch is merged.

[Your Name]
